changes.text: Deep Work Environment.
changes.details: Flagship productivity feature that blocks apps, minimizes notifications, activates DND and more.

changes.text: Focus Lock & Emergency Exam Mode.
changes.details: Advanced anti-distraction features preventing accidental exits with PIN and Biometric verifications.

changes.text: AI Study Planner & Study Room.
changes.details: Intelligent study organizer for exams like MBBS, NEET PG, UPSC, JEE.

changes.text: Smart Alarm & Dopamine Detox.
changes.details: Smart challenge-based alarms, and a dopamine detox protocol.

changes.text: Battery Guardian & Charging Assistant.
changes.details: Track charging habits, estimate full charge time, and monitor battery wear.

changes.text: Advanced Widgets & Visual Upgrades.
changes.details: Widgets with Material You, premium micro-interactions, haptics, and Nothing-inspired performance boosts.

changes.text: Unified and completely reorganized Dashboard Layout with live hardware telemetry chips.
changes.details: Redesigned the top layout combining the clock, date, and hardware metrics. Removed redundant cards and brought everything into a cleaner interface.

changes.text: Background Updater and Auto-Updating Changelog from GitHub.
changes.details: The app now silently fetches new release info from GitHub and merges it into the Changelog dynamically.

changes.text: Dynamic User Manual based on Changelog events.
changes.details: The User Manual now automatically adds a 'NEW IN' section based on the fetched or current version changelog.

changes.text: Update Status Dialog.
changes.details: You can explicitly check for updates from the profile, leading to an aesthetic prompt to download the latest APK directly.

changes.text: Added daily focus-streak badge on dashboard utilizing Room database.
changes.details: The dashboard now pulls the active focus streak directly from the Room database, keeping track of consecutive days the user has completed focus sessions without breaking the chain.

changes.text: Merged SettingsDialog and SettingsScreen into a unified configuration manager utilizing QSViewModel.
changes.details: Migrated from duplicated settings elements to a single unified view ensuring consistency across layout and functionality, managed effectively by QSViewModel.

changes.text: Created interactive FocusHistoryScreen with Recharts-inspired rendering for session durations.
changes.details: Added a new full-screen graph showing the session durations with smooth transitions and an aesthetic matching the Nothing OS style.

changes.text: Implemented Room database setup for Automation rules and Focus sessions.
changes.details: Created DAOs and database instances locally to ensure data persists offline.

changes.text: Added Nothing style animated switch toggles.
changes.details: Replaced standard Material switches with custom-designed switch components offering satisfying snap animations.

changes.text: Refactored QSViewModel for better state synchronization.
changes.details: Improved the internal data flow between the view model and the UI components, preventing race conditions during rapid state changes.

changes.text: Included Focus mode overlay feature.
changes.details: Users can now trigger a system-level overlay to block out distractions while using the Focus mode timer.

changes.text: Optimized app footprint and build configuration.
changes.details: Trimmed down unused dependencies to reduce the APK size by roughly 15% and improve startup time.

changes.text: Introduced Nothing 2.0 styled widgets.
changes.details: Added monochrome styled widgets mirroring the brand design language.

changes.text: Resolved quick setting drag and drop jitter.
changes.details: Addressed a rendering issue during the drag-and-drop actions on quick settings tiles that caused random skipping.

changes.text: Minor performance improvements in Background services.
changes.details: Cleaned up the coroutine scope management to prevent memory leaks.

changes.text: Initial Release.
changes.details: First stable launch of the application with core features.

changes.text: Core Quick Settings toggles working.
changes.details: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Data, and simple toggles are fully operational and testable.

changes.text: Volume and Brightness sliders included.
changes.details: Draggable sliders for system adjustments added to the main interface.
